title: Java Fullstack
description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
   

  

**Your Role**
* We’re looking for a Fullstack Engineer with 8yr \\+ Experience in Java and Angular
* Design and develop full\\-stack web applications using Java (Spring Boot, Hibernate, etc.) for the backend and Angular for the frontend. Full Stack Developer, with expertise in Java, Angular, Spring Framework, CSS, and HTML
* 6 years\\+ of proven experience as a Developer on complex web\\-based applications, preferably in the field of electrical engineering or similar domains
* Contribute to test automation frameworks and improve automation coverage and reliability.
* Must have hands on experience using GitHub, Confluence, JIRA and JetBrains IntelliJ
* Experience with MongoDB or similar NoSQL databases for efficient data storage and retrieval
* Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve issues across both frontend and backend layers.


 Works in the area of Software Engineering, which encompasses the development, maintenance and optimization of software solutions/applications.1\\. Applies scientific methods to analyse and solve software engineering problems.2\\. He/she is responsible for the development and application of software engineering practice and knowledge, in research, design, development and maintenance.3\\. His/her work requires the exercise of original thought and judgement and the ability to supervise the technical and administrative work of other software engineers.4\\. The software engineer builds skills and expertise of his/her software engineering discipline to reach standard software engineer skills expectations for the applicable role, as defined in Professional Communities.5\\. The software engineer collaborates and acts as team player with other software engineers and stakeholders.
   

  

**Your Profile**
* Participate in code reviews, providing constructive feedback to peers and learning from others.
* Proven experience in full\\-stack web development with expertise in Java (Spring Boot, JPA/Hibernate) and Angular (or similar frontend frameworks like React, Vue).
* Strong understanding of object\\-oriented programming (OOP) principles and software design patterns.
* Experience with building and consuming RESTful APIs.
* Familiarity with version control systems such as Git and CI/CD practices.
* Solid experience with relational databases (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL) and SQL


**What Will You Love Working At Capgemini**
* You will have the opportunity to learn on one of the industry's largest digital learning platforms, with access to 250,000\\+ courses and numerous certifications.
* We’re committed to ensure that people of all backgrounds feel encouraged and have a sense of belonging at Capgemini. You are valued for who you are, and you can bring your original self to work.
* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.
* Capgemini office campuses in India are green and run on 100% renewable electricity. We have installed Solar plants across India locations and ‘Battery Energy Storage Solution’ (BESS) in the Noida and Mumbai campuses. You will have chance to make a difference everyday.


 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55\\-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end\\-to\\-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

title: Release Engineer - Interior/Exterior Design Engineer
description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
   

  

 Header
   

  

**Release Engineer – Interior/Exterior Design Engineer**
**Location: \\-** 
 Pune
   

  

**Experience:\\-** 
 3\\-6 years
   

  

 Long Description
   

  

**Your Role**
 As an Interior Trim Design Engineer, you will be responsible for creating high‑quality 3D models, surfaces, and drawings for automotive interior components using UG‑NX. You will contribute to concept development, feasibility studies, and technical surfaces while ensuring adherence to best design practices and manufacturing requirements. Strong communication, a proactive mindset, and quick learning ability are essential for succeeding in this role.
   

  

**In this role, you will:**
* Create robust 3D solid and surface models, as well as 2D drawings, using UG‑NX with best‑practice methodologies.
* Work on concept and full‑cycle development of car doors, interior trims, and luggage trim components.
* Evaluate package feasibility, manufacturing feasibility, and benchmarking inputs to deliver mature design concepts.
* Develop master sections and technical surfaces to support styling, engineering, and downstream teams.
* Apply knowledge of automotive interiors, component design, and manufacturing processes during model development.
* Ensure all designs meet engineering standards, design guidelines, and feasibility constraints.
* Collaborate with cross‑functional teams and communicate effectively to resolve design issues and align on technical requirements.
* Demonstrate a proactive approach, willingness to learn quickly, and ability to adapt to evolving project needs.


**Your Profile**
* Must have good hands on UG\\-NX Solid, Surface and 2D Drawings applications
* Should hold experience and Know\\-how of Automotive Interiors
* Must have basic knowledge of component feasibility manufacturing Know how
* Understand and deliver mature concepts in design
* Good English communication skills
* Proactive approach with
* Must be a quick Lerner Job Responsibilities
* Concept and complete development for Car Door /Interiors/ luggage trims
* Check package feasibility, manufacturing feasibility, benchmarking
* Create master sections and technical surface for input to styling
* Create 2D drawings, Crete a good 3D models with best methodologies in order to implement

**Project Role :** 
 Software Development Engineer

 Analyze, design, code and test multiple components of application code across one or more clients. Perform maintenance, enhancements and/or development work.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Java Enterprise Edition
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 5 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary: As a Software Development Engineer, you will engage in a dynamic work environment where you will analyze, design, code, and test various components of application code across multiple clients. Your day will involve collaborating with team members to perform maintenance and enhancements, ensuring that the applications meet the evolving needs of users and stakeholders. You will also be responsible for developing new features and functionalities, contributing to the overall success of the projects you are involved in. Roles \\& Responsibilities: \\- Expected to be an SME. \\- Collaborate and manage the team to perform. \\- Responsible for team decisions. \\- Engage with multiple teams and contribute on key decisions. \\- Provide solutions to problems for their immediate team and across multiple teams. \\- Mentor junior team members to enhance their skills and knowledge. \\- Continuously evaluate and improve development processes to increase efficiency. Professional \\& Technical Skills: \\- Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in Java Enterprise Edition. \\- Strong understanding of object\\-oriented programming principles. \\- Experience with web application frameworks such as Spring or JavaServer Faces. \\- Familiarity with database management systems and SQL. \\- Knowledge of software development methodologies, including Agile and Scrum. Additional Information: \\- The candidate should have minimum 5 years of experience in Java Enterprise Edition. \\- This position is based at our Pune office. \\- A 15 years full time education is required.

title: Java Software Engineer
description:
Avensys is a reputed global IT professional services company headquartered in Singapore. Our service spectrum includes enterprise solution consulting, business intelligence, business process automation and managed services. Given our decade of success, we have evolved to become one of the top trusted providers in Singapore and service a client base across banking and financial services, insurance, information technology, healthcare, retail and supply chain.
 



  





 Job Description
 



 We are hiring Java Developer with experience in cross\\-functional, international environments. This role offers strong growth opportunities and a healthy work–life balance. More details as below:
 



 Job Summary as Java Developer
 



 We are currently searching for professionals with around 3 years’ proven experience in Java/J2EE and related technologies.
 



 Primarily responsible for developing and customizing enterprise products \\& solutions for augmenting human identity \\& security using biometrics:
 



  





 • Hands\\-on development using agile development methodologies for creating high\\-quality software products and solutions using Java/J2EE
 



 • Should be capable of carrying solutions from design, implementation, testing \\& deployment
 



 • On\\-time delivery of code in support of product plans and project milestones
 



 • Report on product/project status to senior management
 



 • Collaborate on development projects with team of engineers located in Bangalore and Europe
 



 • Support POCs \\& benchmark exercises in APAC \\& Europe (around 20% international travel)
 



 • Work well within a fast\\-paced cross\\-functional environment with multiple teams including engineering, infrastructure/IT, R\\&D and business development
 



  





 To succeed in the above mission, you will need the following skills/experience:
 



 • A minimum of 3\\+ years of experience working in a similar role that includes a Backend Micro service development and Security industry exposure in solution design and delivery
 



 • Experience working on projects involving collaboration between software development \\& integration is a plus
 



 • Very strong background in core Java, J2EE, RESTFul/SOAP based webservices
 



 • Experience with the following is a must: Message oriented middleware; Tomcat or WildFly (JBoss); Building SOA web\\-services/REST; Junit testing
 



 • Hands\\-on experience on building Maven or Gradle tools
 



 • Experience with one or more of following is plus – CDI, Event Management System, Spring, Hibernate, Multi\\-threading or distributed system
 



 • Experience with one or more agile project management tools like Jira is a plus
 



 • Experience with Open Stack or Amazon Web Services is a plus
 



 • Effective communicator capable of explaining concepts clearly and credibly across all levels of the organization
 



 • Strong team player, results oriented, metric driven and capable of working in a fast paced, changing environment.
 



  





  





 WHAT’S ON OFFER
 



  





  





  





 You will be remunerated with an excellent base salary and entitled to attractive company benefits. Additionally, you will get the opportunity to enjoy a fun and collaborative work environment, alongside a strong career progression.
 



  





  





  





 To submit your application, please apply online or email your UPDATED CV to Sandeep.kumar@aven\\-sys.com or WhatsApp at \\+65 6761 9819
 







  





 Your interest will be treated with strict confidentiality.
 



  





  





  





 CONSULTANT DETAILS:
 



  





 Consultant Name : Sandeep Kumar
 



  





 Avensys Consulting Pte Ltd
 



  





 EA Licence 12C5759
 



  





 Privacy Statement: Data collected will be used for recruitment purposes only. Personal data provided will be used strictly in accordance with the relevant data protection law and Avensys' privacy policy

title: Systems Engineer
description:
Enghouse Systems is a publicly traded, global software company. Our IT department is looking to hire a Systems Engineer which provides 2nd tier escalation for our frontline helpdesk staff as well as playing an active part in developing, refining and documenting continuous improvement initiatives, repeatable processes and procedures for managing the IT infrastructure environment globally.
   

  

 Reporting to the Corporate Infrastructure Manager, this role is a hybrid position that requires attendance at the Pune office once a week.
   

  

 Position Responsibilities:
   

  

* Serves as an escalation contact point for hardware and software issues related to the IT infrastructure environment. A responsibility of this role is to be ready to receive and troubleshoot escalated support requests through the global helpdesk ticketing system, to a timely and successful resolution.
* As required, this role will work with other senior IT staff to architect and develop the ongoing success of the IT infrastructure in Enghouse data centers.
* Also as necessary, this role will also provide ongoing support to the company’s acquisition integration work.
* On a weekly basis, through the outputs of the IT Helpdesk software, and other reporting tools, this role shall evaluate, analyze and report statistics related to; ticket levels, support incidents and resource utilization which will lead to making recommendations to resolve these issues and prevent ongoing issues reoccurring.
* Educates the business on issues related to best practice, lifecycle management and preventative ongoing maintenance on their use IT systems.
* Internal IT support services are unpredictable, and global. This role encompasses systems that span the globe. While the team is also global, issues can arise at any time and as such, this role maintains flexible working hours as required by IT management.
* Participates in projects and acquisitions with other functional groups as required; participates in short and long\\-term corporate network planning and product selections.
* Performs and assumes other duties and responsibilities as required.


 Essential Education, Skills and Experience:
   

  

* Strong analytical skills necessary to develop and maintain ongoing performance levels of the infrastructure.
* A minimum of 3 years working with Microsoft technologies and Hyper\\-V or VMWare visualization environments.
* A minimum of 5 years exposure to a Microsoft Windows technical support and TCP based network environment.
* Systems administration experience in a corporate environment.
* Strong interpersonal skills: possesses a strong customer satisfaction attitude.
* Ability to effectively communicate both in writing and orally with all levels of internal users, including executive management.
* Strong time management skills: perform a variety of tasks and assignments simultaneously.
* Be a team player within a global structure.
